country|every_scope_ally|Iterate through all allies to a: country
law|every_scope_amendment|Iterate through amendments of the scoped law
country,front,hq|every_scope_army|Iterate through all armies currently present at input scope Supported scopes: country, front, hq
treaty|every_scope_article|Iterate through articles of the scoped treaty

country,state|every_scope_building|Iterate through all buildings in a: state, country

country,state|every_scope_culture|Iterate through all cultures in the scope
country|every_scope_diplomatic_pact|Any diplomatic pact of the country in a scope

country|every_subject_of_subject|Any country below direct subjects in hierarchy
country|every_subject_or_below|Any country below current in hierarchy
political_movement|every_supporting_character|Iterate through all characters that support the scoped political movement
none|every_treaty|Iterate through treaties (both in force and drafts)
country|every_valid_mass_migration_culture|Lists for cultures in the scoped country that are valid for mass migration
war|every_war_participant|Iterate through all participants in a war
none|execute_event_option|Execute effects of the specified event option in the specified event
character|exile_character|Exile a character to the exile pool
state_region|finish_harvest_condition|Finish a harvest condition of type in the scoped state region
interest_group|finish_negotiation|Finishes the negotiation that has started for an interest group:
state|force_resource_depletion|Forces a resource depletion in state
state|force_resource_discovery|Forces a resource discovery in state
character|free_character_from_void|Frees a character from the void, if set to no character is deleted instead
military_formation|fully_mobilize_army|Fully mobilizes scope army
none|hidden_effect|Enclosed effects are not shown in tooltips
none|if|Executes enclosed effects if limit criteria are met
interest_group|improve_stance|Improves the stance of an IG on the currently enacting law by the given number of steps:
country|increase_autonomy|Change a country's subject type to a more autonomus one
country|join_power_bloc|Scoped country joins the power bloc of the target scoped country
interest_group|join_revolution|Adds interest group to ongoing revolution
war|join_war|Makes target join a scoped war in a specific side.
character|kill_character|Kill a character kill_character
ship|kill_crew|Kills a given amount of a ship's crew
ship|kill_crew_percent|Kills a given percentage of a ship's crew
country|kill_population|Kills a number of individuals in the population in the scoped country.
state|kill_population_in_state|Kills a number of individuals in the population in the scoped state.
country|kill_population_percent|Kills a percentage of the population in the scoped country.
state|kill_population_percent_in_state|Kills a percentage of the population in the scoped state.
ship|kill_ship|Destroys the scoped ship
country,state|liberate_slaves|Frees all slaves in the country/state
country|liberate_slaves_in_incorporated_states|Frees all slaves in the country's incorporated states
country|liberate_slaves_in_unincorporated_states|Frees all slaves in the country's unincorporated states
country|make_independent|Makes a country independent.
military_formation|mobilize_army|Mobilizes scope army
pop|move_partial_pop|Moves the scoped pop to the specified state (they become unemployed)
pop|move_pop|Moves the scoped pop in its entirety to the specified state (they become unemployed) NOTE: VERY IMPORTANT! This effect _may_ change the pop type of...
country|ordered_active_law|Iterate through all active laws in a country limit
country|ordered_active_party|Iterate through all active political parties in a country limit
none|ordered_character|Iterate through all characters globally limit
none|ordered_character_in_exile_pool|Iterate through characters in the exile pool limit
none|ordered_character_in_void|Iterate through characters in the void limit
character|ordered_character_role|Iterate through all roles of the scoped character limit
country|ordered_civil_war|Iterate through all civil wars related to the scoped country limit
country|ordered_cobelligerent_in_diplo_play|Iterate through all co-belligerents of scope country in all diplomatic plays (includes wars) limit
country|ordered_cobelligerent_in_war|Iterate through all co-belligerents of scope country in all wars limit
battle,building,front,hq,military_formation|ordered_combat_unit|Iterate through all combat units of input scope Supported scopes: building, military formation, front, battle limit
country|ordered_company|Iterate through all companies in a country limit
none|ordered_country|Iterate through all countries globally limit

country|ordered_rivaling_country|Any country that is rivaling the country in a scope limit
country,front,interest_group,military_formation|ordered_scope_admiral|Iterate through all admirals in a: country, interestgroup, or military formation limit
country|ordered_scope_ally|Iterate through all allies to a: country limit
law|ordered_scope_amendment|Iterate through amendments of the scoped law limit
country,front,hq|ordered_scope_army|Iterate through all armies currently present at input scope Supported scopes: country, front, hq limit
treaty|ordered_scope_article|Iterate through articles of the scoped treaty limit
treaty_options,treaty|ordered_scope_article_option|Iterate through article_options of the scoped treaty or treaty_options limit
country,state|ordered_scope_building|Iterate through all buildings in a: state, country limit
country,front,interest_group,military_formation|ordered_scope_character|Iterate through all characters in a: country, interestgroup, or front limit
market,state_region,strategic_region|ordered_scope_country|Iterate through all countries with a presence in the supported scope (currently: market, strategic region) limit
country,state|ordered_scope_culture|Iterate through all cultures in the scope limit
country|ordered_scope_diplomatic_pact|Any diplomatic pact of the country in a scope limit
country,hq|ordered_scope_fleet|Iterate through all fleets currently present at input scope Supported scopes: country, hq limit
war|ordered_scope_front|Iterate through all Fronts related to the scoped War limit
country,front,interest_group,military_formation|ordered_scope_general|Iterate through all generals in a: country, interestgroup, front, or military formation limit
country|ordered_scope_held_interest_marker|Iterate through all interest markers held by a country limit
country,culture|ordered_scope_homeland_state|Iterate through all states that are a homeland for the scoped culture, or a homeland of any primary culture of the scoped country limit
diplomatic_play|ordered_scope_initiator_ally|Iterate through all allies to an initiator in a: diplomatic play limit
country,state_region,strategic_region|ordered_scope_interest_marker|Iterate through all interest markers in a: country, strategic region, state region limit
journal_entry|ordered_scope_je_involved|Iterate through all involved in a journal entry limit
diplomatic_play|ordered_scope_play_involved|Iterate through all involved in a: diplomatic play limit
country,front,interest_group,military_formation|ordered_scope_politician|Iterate through all politicians in a: country or interestgroup limit
country,culture,interest_group,state|ordered_scope_pop|Iterate through all pops in a: country, state, interest group, culture limit
company|ordered_scope_regional_hqs|Iterate through regional HQs of the scoped company limit
country,military_formation|ordered_scope_ship|Iterate through all ships in a country or military formation limit
country,front,state_region,strait,strategic_region,theater|ordered_scope_state|Iterate through all states including provinces from a: country, state_region, theater, front, or strait limit
country,state|ordered_scope_strait|Iterate through all straits with a land endpoint in the scoped state or country limit
diplomatic_play|ordered_scope_target_ally|Iterate through all allies to a target in a: diplomatic play limit
country|ordered_scope_theater|Iterate through all theaters in a: country limit
country|ordered_scope_treaty|Iterate through in force treaties binding the scoped country limit
country|ordered_scope_violate_sovereignty_interested_parties|Iterate through all countries that would be interested if country in scope has their sovereignty violated limit
country|ordered_scope_violate_sovereignty_wars|Iterate through all relevant wars if target country had their sovereignty violated by scoped country limit
country|ordered_scope_war|Iterate through all wars related to the scope limit
state|ordered_sea_node_adjacent_state|Iterate through all states that share a sea node with a state limit
none|ordered_state|Iterate through all states globally limit

country|ordered_subject_of_subject|Any country below direct subjects in hierarchy limit
country|ordered_subject_or_below|Any country below current in hierarchy limit
political_movement|ordered_supporting_character|Iterate through all characters that support the scoped political movement limit
none|ordered_treaty|Iterate through treaties (both in force and drafts) limit
country|ordered_valid_mass_migration_culture|Lists for cultures in the scoped country that are valid for mass migration limit
war|ordered_war_participant|Iterate through all participants in a war limit
character|place_character_in_void|Banishes a character to the void, duration is how long character is kept before being deleted
country|play_as|Change which country scoped country's player will play as
none|post_audio_event|Runs an audio even on a "persistent" audio object
none|post_notification|Posts notification
none|post_proposal|Posts proposal
none|random|run an effect depending on a random chance, do nothing otherwise.
country|random_active_law|Iterate through all active laws in a country
country|random_active_party|Iterate through all active political parties in a country
none|random_character|Iterate through all characters globally
none|random_character_in_exile_pool|Iterate through characters in the exile pool
none|random_character_in_void|Iterate through characters in the void
character|random_character_role|Iterate through all roles of the scoped character
country|random_civil_war|Iterate through all civil wars related to the scoped country
country|random_cobelligerent_in_diplo_play|Iterate through all co-belligerents of scope country in all diplomatic plays (includes wars)
country|random_cobelligerent_in_war|Iterate through all co-belligerents of scope country in all wars
battle,building,front,hq,military_formation|random_combat_unit|Iterate through all combat units of input scope Supported scopes: building, military formation, front, battle
country|random_company|Iterate through all companies in a country
none|random_country|Iterate through all countries globally
none|random_country_in_afghanistan|money_amount_multiplier_very_small

country|random_country_strategic_region|Iterate through all strategic regions containing states owned by the scoped country
none|random_decentralized_country|Iterate through all countries that are decentralized
country|random_diplomatic_catalyst|Iterate through all diplomatic catalysts in the recent memory of a country
none|random_diplomatic_play|Iterate through all diplomatic plays globally
country|random_diplomatically_relevant_country|Iterate through all diplomatically relevant countries of a country scope
country|random_direct_subject|Any country directly below current in hierarchy
country|random_enemy_in_diplo_play|Iterate through all enemies of scope country in all diplomatic plays (includes wars)
country|random_enemy_in_war|Iterate through all enemies of scope country in all wars
country,state,state_region,strategic_region|random_harvest_condition|Iterate through all harvest conditions affecting a state, state region, strategic region, or country
none|random_in_global_list|Iterate through all items in global list.
country|random_in_hierarchy|Any country in current hierarchy, including current
none|random_in_list|Iterate through all items in list.
none|random_in_local_list|Iterate through all items in local list.
political_movement|random_influenced_interest_group|Iterate through all interest groups influenced by a political movement
country|random_interest_group|Iterate through all interest groups in a country
country|random_law|Iterate through all laws in a country
none|random_list|Selects one effect from a weighted random list and executes it.
political_lobby|random_lobby_member|Iterate through all interest group members of a lobby
none|random_log_scopes|Log the current scope to the random log when this effect executes.
none|random_market|Iterate through all markets globally
market|random_market_goods|Iterate through all active (market) goods in a market
party|random_member|Iterate through all interest group members of a party
country,front,hq|random_military_formation|Iterate through all military formations currently present at input scope Supported scopes: country, front, hq
country,state,state_region,strategic_region|random_neighbouring_state|Iterate through all states neighbouring a state region
country|random_overlord_or_above|Any country above current in hierarchy
company|random_owned_country|Iterate through all countries owned by the scoped company
diplomatic_pact|random_participant|Any of two participants of the diplomatic pact in a scope
country,interest_group|random_political_lobby|Iterate through all political lobbies in a country or interest group
country|random_political_movement|Iterate through all political movements in a country
law|random_possible_amendment_type|Iterate through amendment types that could be added to the scoped law
country|random_potential_party|Iterate through all potential political parties in a country
none|random_power_bloc|Iterate through all power blocs
power_bloc|random_power_bloc_member|Iterate through all members of the scoped power bloc including the leader
interest_group|random_preferred_law|Iterate through all active and possible laws in an interest group's country, ordered by how much they prefer that law
country,country_definition|random_primary_culture|Primary cultures of the scoped country or country definition
province|random_province|Iterate through all Provinces in the scoped State

country|random_rival_country|Any country that is being rivaled by the country in a scope
country|random_rivaling_country|Any country that is rivaling the country in a scope
country,front,interest_group,military_formation|random_scope_admiral|Iterate through all admirals in a: country, interestgroup, or military formation
country|random_scope_ally|Iterate through all allies to a: country
law|random_scope_amendment|Iterate through amendments of the scoped law
country,front,hq|random_scope_army|Iterate through all armies currently present at input scope Supported scopes: country, front, hq
treaty|random_scope_article|Iterate through articles of the scoped treaty
treaty_options,treaty|random_scope_article_option|Iterate through article_options of the scoped treaty or treaty_options
country,state|random_scope_building|Iterate through all buildings in a: state, country
country,front,interest_group,military_formation|random_scope_character|Iterate through all characters in a: country, interestgroup, or front
market,state_region,strategic_region|random_scope_country|Iterate through all countries with a presence in the supported scope (currently: market, strategic region)
country,state|random_scope_culture|Iterate through all cultures in the scope
country|random_scope_diplomatic_pact|Any diplomatic pact of the country in a scope
country,hq|random_scope_fleet|Iterate through all fleets currently present at input scope Supported scopes: country, hq
war|random_scope_front|Iterate through all Fronts related to the scoped War
country,front,interest_group,military_formation|random_scope_general|Iterate through all generals in a: country, interestgroup, front, or military formation
country|random_scope_held_interest_marker|Iterate through all interest markers held by a country
country,culture|random_scope_homeland_state|Iterate through all states that are a homeland for the scoped culture, or a homeland of any primary culture of the scoped country
diplomatic_play|random_scope_initiator_ally|Iterate through all allies to an initiator in a: diplomatic play
country,state_region,strategic_region|random_scope_interest_marker|Iterate through all interest markers in a: country, strategic region, state region
journal_entry|random_scope_je_involved|Iterate through all involved in a journal entry
diplomatic_play|random_scope_play_involved|Iterate through all involved in a: diplomatic play
country,front,interest_group,military_formation|random_scope_politician|Iterate through all politicians in a: country or interestgroup
country,culture,interest_group,state|random_scope_pop|Iterate through all pops in a: country, state, interest group, culture
company|random_scope_regional_hqs|Iterate through regional HQs of the scoped company
country,military_formation|random_scope_ship|Iterate through all ships in a country or military formation
country,front,state_region,strait,strategic_region,theater|random_scope_state|Iterate through all states including provinces from a: country, state_region, theater, front, or strait
country,state|random_scope_strait|Iterate through all straits with a land endpoint in the scoped state or country
diplomatic_play|random_scope_target_ally|Iterate through all allies to a target in a: diplomatic play
country|random_scope_theater|Iterate through all theaters in a: country
country|random_scope_treaty|Iterate through in force treaties binding the scoped country
country|random_scope_violate_sovereignty_interested_parties|Iterate through all countries that would be interested if country in scope has their sovereignty violated
country|random_scope_violate_sovereignty_wars|Iterate through all relevant wars if target country had their sovereignty violated by scoped country
country|random_scope_war|Iterate through all wars related to the scope
state|random_sea_node_adjacent_state|Iterate through all states that share a sea node with a state
none|random_state|Iterate through all states globally

none|random_strategic_region_in_zanj_old|average_italian_fervor
country|random_subject_of_subject|Any country below direct subjects in hierarchy
country|random_subject_or_below|Any country below current in hierarchy
political_movement|random_supporting_character|Iterate through all characters that support the scoped political movement
none|random_treaty|Iterate through treaties (both in force and drafts)
country|random_valid_mass_migration_culture|Lists for cultures in the scoped country that are valid for mass migration
war|random_war_participant|Iterate through all participants in a war
country|recalculate_pop_ig_support|Recalculates and updates a country's pop IG
country|regime_change|Executes a regime change by the scope country in the target country.
country|remove_active_objective_subgoal|Removes an active objective subgoal
amendment|remove_amendment|Removes an amendment immediately without checking cooldown
character|remove_as_interest_group_leader|Removes a character from position as interest group leader
country|remove_banned_goods|Removes a total ban of a good from a country
state|remove_building|Remove a building in the scope state
political_movement|remove_character_ideology|Removes a character ideology from the scoped political movement
character|remove_character_role|Removes an existing role from a character, works with either archetype or database role
state_region|remove_claim|Removes scoped state region as a claim for target country
country|remove_company|Removes company type from a country's companies
culture|remove_cultural_obsession|Removes a new obsession to the culture in scope Where X is a goods
culture|remove_cultural_taboo|Removes a taboo from the culture in scope Where X is a goods
country|remove_diplomatic_pact|Removes a diplomatic pact between two countries, with scope country as initiator
country|remove_enactment_modifier|Removes an enactment-related timed modifier effect to object in scope
state_goods|remove_exports|Removes a multiplier of exports to the state for the scoped state goods
none|remove_from_list|Removes the current scope from a named list remove_from_list
none|remove_global_variable|Removes a variable
state_region|remove_homeland|Removes scoped state region as Homeland for target culture
interest_group|remove_ideology|Removes an ideology from scoped interest group
party|remove_ig_from_party|Removes target interest group from scope party py:py_key
state_goods|remove_imports|Removes a multiplier of imports to the state for the scoped state goods
diplomatic_play|remove_initiator_backers|Remove a tag/scope country from the initiator side of a diplomatic play
journal_entry|remove_involved_country|Removes target country from involved countries in scope journal entry
none|remove_list_global_variable|Removes the target from a variable list remove_list_variable
none|remove_list_local_variable|Removes the target from a variable list remove_list_variable
none|remove_list_variable|Removes the target from a variable list Where X is the name of the variable Where Y is an event target
political_lobby|remove_lobby_member|Removes an interest group as a member of scope political lobby
none|remove_local_variable|Removes a variable
country,building,character,institution,interest_group,journal_entry,political_movement,power_bloc,state|remove_modifier|Removes a timed modifier effect to object in scope
country|remove_monopoly|removes a monopoly in a country scope for a specific building:
company|remove_owned_country|Removes the scoped company's ownership of the target country
country|remove_primary_culture|Removes a culture from the primary cultures of a country Where X is a culture scope
power_bloc|remove_principle|Removes principle from powerbloc power_bloc
state,state_region|remove_resource_potential|Remove a building type from the resource potentials of a state region

state_region|remove_state_trait|remove state trait in a scoped state region
diplomatic_play|remove_target_backers|Remove a tag/scope country to the target side of a diplomatic play
country|remove_taxed_goods|Removes consumption taxes on a good from a country
culture|remove_tradition_trait|Removes an existing tradition trait from the culture in scope Where X is a tradition trait
character|remove_trait|Remove a trait from a Character
none|remove_variable|Removes a variable
diplomatic_play|remove_war_goal|Removes a war goal from a DP.
character|replace_character_roles|Replaces existing role(s) from a character with another, works with either archetype or database role replace_character_role
state|reset_hub_names|Resets the names of all hubs in a scoped state
state|reset_state_name|Resets the name of a scoped state
diplomatic_play|resolve_play_for|effect end diplo play for one side, with it gaining war goals
character|retire_character|Retire a character retire_character
character|retire_character_if_should_be_culled|Conditionally retire a character if it should be culled retire_character_if_should_be_culled
none|round_global_variable|Rounds a variable to the nearest specified value round_variable
none|round_local_variable|Rounds a variable to the nearest specified value round_variable
none|round_variable|Rounds a variable to the nearest specified value Where X is the name of the variable Where Y is a script value
none|save_scope_as|Saves the current scope as an arbitrarily-named target to be referenced later in the (unbroken) event chain
none|save_scope_value_as|Saves a numerical or bool value as an arbitrarily-named target to be referenced later in the (unbroken) event chain
none|save_temporary_scope_as|Saves the current scope as an arbitrarily-named temporary target to be referenced later in the same effect
none|save_temporary_scope_value_as|Saves a numerical or bool value as an arbitrarily-named temporary target to be referenced later in the same effect
country|seize_investment_pool|Seize investment pool for the treasury and transfer all private construction queue elements to the government

ship|set_as_flagship|Assign/unassign the ship as a flagship for the country
character|set_as_interest_group_leader|Sets a character as interest group leader
